item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I liked it. Surprised to not see more comments

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I was too late to participate in the Holiday Art Exchange, so I agreed to rewrite this article by Almarduk, who I understand is not on the site anymore, as a gesture of kindness and goodwill in the New Year. I wanted to try and honor their story and dialogue, so this is a light rewrite to make it stronger and more literary.

Photo credits are below:

https://cdn.pixabay.com/photo/2016/09/05/21/11/lost-places-1647704_1280.jpg

https://cdn.pixabay.com/photo/2015/04/16/15/22/japan-725795_1280.jpg

https://commons.m.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:A_Visible_and_Infrared_Survey_Telescope_for_Astronomy_Before_Sunset.jpg#mw-jump-to-license

And here were Almarduk’s original thanks:
Thanks to morhadow, Agente marw, Uncle Nicolini, LazyLasagne, Popsioak, JackalRelated, FloppyPhoenix and everyone I'm probably missing for the help!
Extra thanks to Dc_Yerko for this beautiful canon I want to see grow.
